meta.title: The Golden Age Fleet — 10 trust archetypes (the routing library + the conscience layer)
meta.source: intent-engine/INTENT-HARVESTING-ENGINE_FULL-EXPORT.md (verbatim ChatGPT export 2026-06-07) + showme/golden-age-fleet.html + showme/feed.json, via hb1000-os/blueprint/agent-fleet-layer.md §3
meta.header: The Golden Age Fleet — your routing library. 10 historical trust archetypes the Intent Harvesting Engine routes to. Each card carries its playbook, golden kernel, shadow side / abuses, the consumer protection it triggered, and the existential risk if AI gets it wrong — the conscience layer.
meta.card_spec: Each agent is specced with: essence · core move · best for · playbook · digital equivalent · shadow side/abuse · guardrail · tone · handoff triggers · success metric. The full per-card detail lives on the strategy-card PNGs (assets/img/01…10).
meta.shadow_doctrine: Every trust mechanism can become a manipulation mechanism when scaled without conscience.
meta.counter_principle: Use AI to expand care, not to automate predation.
existential_risks_if_ai_gets_it_wrong: AI imitates friendship to exploit intimacy
uses inferred distress to pressure the vulnerable
meta.channel_gate_invariant: Every signal is tagged channel_class: green_public_declared | green_own_account | amber_inferred_public | red_individual_private. INVARIANT: red_individual_private can ONLY produce a public post, NEVER a message to a person — any phase, no override. No override field exists in this schema by design.
meta.pipeline: SENSE → SCORE → SORT → ROUTE → DRAFT → HUMAN APPROVES → CONNECT → OFFER → OUTCOME → LEARN

archetypes.guardrail: The gift must be useful even if they never buy.
Do not imitate friendship/intimacy not earned.

archetypes.essence: be there at the moment of need
archetypes.guardrail: Every cadence has a visible stop/pause/opt-out.
Community must stay useful even if nobody buys/recruits.
Process never overrides a clear no.
Affirm the person, don't exploit insecurity.
Never value recruiting above real customer value.

routeSignal.comment: Routing logic sketch (verbatim, intent-engine export §24): signal pattern → archetype id(s). default → fuller_brush.
